translations.slogan: Delivering user-friendly, responsive digital experiences that align user needs with business objectives.

description: Junior Frontend Developer with 2.5 years at Glomli Technology, creating user-friendly and visually engaging web experiences.
Hands-on with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js, Bootstrap, and TailwindCSS, focused on clean, maintainable, and responsive interfaces.
Adaptable teammate with a solution-oriented mindset, delivering digital products that balance user needs and business goals.

items.summary: Lead and build modern web experiences for national-scale initiatives (GoTürkiye, Culture Route Festival, AKM, Health Türkiye), delivering responsive UIs, email templates, and content workflows with React, Next.js, TypeScript, Bootstrap, and TailwindCSS.
Supported software and content development, contributing to UI improvements and internal tools while learning modern frontend practices and collaborative workflows.

items.title: GoTürkiye — Official Travel Guide
items.description: Developed email templates and content workflows for Türkiye's official tourism platform under the Ministry of Culture and Tourism.

items.title: Culture Route Festival 2024
items.description: Built web-based software and email systems to enhance event communication for national festivals, partnered with the Ministry of Culture and Tourism.

items.title: Atatürk Cultural Center (AKM)
items.description: Created digital content and email templates to elevate the cultural center's online presence in collaboration with the Ministry of Culture and Tourism.

items.title: Health Türkiye
items.description: Contributed to software and content development to strengthen global visibility and user experience for the platform under the Ministry of Health.

items.details: Completed primary education with a strong academic foundation.
Developed an early interest in technology and computers.
Focused on science and mathematics, building a pathway toward software development.
Continuing studies in software development, web technologies, and programming languages.
